title: The Tavern Mystery
description: A short adventure to test NPC interactions. Talk to the locals, gather clues, and find the hidden treasure.
author: Claude

tavern.name: The Dusty Tavern
tavern.description: A dimly lit tavern with creaking floorboards. The smell of ale and woodsmoke fills the air. A worn counter stretches along the back wall.

alley.name: The Back Alley
alley.description: A narrow alley behind the tavern. Crates and barrels are stacked against the walls. Moonlight filters through the gap between buildings.

cellar_entrance.name: Cellar Entrance
cellar_entrance.description: A heavy wooden door leads down into darkness. The air is cold and damp.

notice_board.name: notice board
notice_board.description: A wooden board pinned with faded notices. One reads: 'REWARD - Lost heirloom, last seen in the cellar.'
notice_board.examine_text: Most notices are about missing cats and odd jobs. But one stands out - someone is offering gold for a family heirloom locked away in the tavern cellar.

ale.name: mug of ale
ale.description: A foaming mug of ale sitting on the counter.

crate.name: wooden crate
crate.description: A sturdy wooden crate. Something might be hidden behind it.
crate.examine_text: You peer behind the crate and notice scratch marks on the wall, as if something was dragged here recently.

old_key.name: rusty key
old_key.description: An old iron key, coated in rust but still solid.

cellar_door.name: cellar door
cellar_door.description: A heavy oak door with an iron lock. It looks sturdy.

treasure_chest.name: treasure chest
treasure_chest.description: A small wooden chest with ornate carvings. It's locked tight.

heirloom.name: golden heirloom
heirloom.description: A beautiful golden locket on a fine chain. This must be the lost heirloom from the notice.

puzzles.name: Unlock the Cellar
puzzles.description: Use the rusty key to open the cellar door.
puzzles.completion_text: The lock clicks open with a grinding sound. The cellar door swings inward.
puzzles.lock_fail_text: The door is locked. You need a key.

puzzles.name: Recover the Heirloom
puzzles.win_text: You pick up the golden locket. The lost heirloom! The barkeep will be thrilled. You've solved the tavern mystery!

barkeep.name: Barkeep
barkeep.description: A burly man with a thick beard and kind eyes. He polishes a glass absentmindedly while watching the room.
barkeep.greeting: Welcome, stranger! Take a seat. You look like someone who could use a drink... and maybe a job. Check the notice board if you're interested.

topics.heirloom: My grandmother's locket went missing weeks ago. I think the old caretaker hid it in the cellar before he vanished. But I lost the key somewhere out back.
topics.key: I had an old iron key for the cellar, but I dropped it in the alley behind the tavern. Haven't had time to look for it.
topics.cellar: The cellar's been locked up for months. Nobody goes down there anymore. If you find the key, you're welcome to take a look.
topics.caretaker: Old Morven used to look after the place. Disappeared one night without a word. Shady fellow, if you ask me.
topics.drink: Ha! Help yourself to the ale on the counter. On the house.

cat.name: Tabby Cat
cat.description: A scruffy orange tabby cat. It watches you with half-closed eyes, tail flicking lazily.
cat.greeting: The cat meows and rubs against your leg. It seems to want attention... or food.

topics.key: The cat paws at the ground near the crates and meows insistently. Maybe there's something hidden there.
topics.food: The cat's ears perk up at the mention of food. It looks toward the tavern hopefully.

ghost.name: Ghostly Figure
ghost.description: A translucent, shimmering figure in old servant's clothes. It flickers in and out of visibility.
ghost.greeting: The ghostly figure turns to face you. 'So... someone finally came. I am Morven. I didn't steal the locket - I was trying to protect it. Open the chest and return it to its rightful owner.'

topics.locket: The ghost sighs. 'The locket holds more than sentimental value. It belonged to the barkeep's grandmother, a woman of great wisdom. Keep it safe.'
topics.chest: 'The chest holds the heirloom. Use the key and take it back upstairs. My task here is done.'
topics.morven: 'I was the caretaker here for twenty years. When I discovered someone was trying to steal the locket, I hid it. But the effort... cost me everything.'
